🇪🇺

EUFilter — Mandatory Safe Browsing Gateway

Operated under EU Regulation 1337/420 — Extremely Serious Internet Concerns Act

Enter the URL you wish to visit

All outbound web traffic is subject to vibes screening in accordance with EU law. Sites that are too fun require age verification. This is for your safety. Probably.

ℹ️ This gateway is operated by your Internet Service Provider on behalf of the EU Bureau of Vibes and Digital Oversight (EUBVDO). Compliance is mandatory.
EUFilter v1.3.3.7 — EU Bureau of Vibes and Digital Oversight Regulation (EU) 1337/420  |  EUBVDO-GW-004
